content: I knew Arjun through yoga classes. We had an affair for 8 months — ended in September. I had no contact with him after September 25th. I have no idea about his death. I was in Rishikesh on October 15th. My retreat center has attendance logs. I have never met Vikram or Nidhi. I don’t know why anyone would link me to this. I am not hiding anything. My phone records prove I was not in Pune that night.
